zh.lifeSummary: Robert De Gernon於1020年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯蒙特費奎特。他於大約1066年與Madam Dinham在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾福雷斯波利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1066年移民到英國並於1030年住在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也。他去世於1086年在法國諾門迪享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert De Gernon于1020年出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯蒙特費奎特。他于大约1066年与Madam Dinham在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾福雷斯波利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1066年移民到英国并于1030年住在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也。他去世于1086年在法国諾門迪享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Grennan   1.

variants.name: Grennan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Kieran.
English (Lancashire, of Norman origin): nickname for a man with a moustache, from Old French gernon, grenon ‘moustache’.
Irish (Offaly, Westmeath and Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Grianáin (see Greenan ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: Robert De Gernon was born in 1020, in Montfiquet, Calvados, Normandy, France. He married Madam Dinham about 1066, in Wraysbury, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He immigrated to England in 1066 and lived in Bayeux, Calvados, Normandy, France in 1030. He died in 1086, in Normandy, France, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert De Gernon est né en 1020, à Montfiquet, Calvados, Normandie, France. Il a épousé Madam Dinham environ 1066, à Wraysbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il a immigré au Angleterre en 1066 et a vécu à Bayeux, Calvados, Normandie, France en 1030. Il est décédé en 1086, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 66 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert De Gernonは1020年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスモントフィクエトで生まれた。約1066年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウレイスブリーでMadam Dinhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1066年にイギリスに移住し，1030年にはフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスバイエウックスに住んでいた。彼は1086年にフランスノーマンディで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert De Gernon(은)는 1020년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 몽피크트에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1066년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 라이스버이에서 Madam Dinham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1066년에 영국로 이민을 떠났고, 1030년도에 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 베이우스에서 살았다. 그는 1086년 프랑스 노먼디에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert De Gernon nasceu em 1020, em Montfiquet, Calvados, Normandie, França. Ele casou-se com Madam Dinham aproximadamente 1066, em Wraysbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele imigrou para o Inglaterra em 1066 e viveu em Bayeux, Calvados, Normandie, França em 1030. Ele faleceu em 1086, em Normandie, França, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert De Gernon родился в 1020 г. в местности монтфикует, калвадос, норманди, Франция. Он женился на женщине по имени Madam Dinham около 1066 г. в местности реисбури, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он иммигрировал в Англия в 1066 году, а также жил в местности беиеукс, калвадос, норманди, Франция в 1030 году. Он умер в 1086 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Robert De Gernon nació en 1020, en Montfiquet, Calvados, Normandie, Francia. Se casó con Madam Dinham aproximadamente 1066, en Wraysbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Inmigró a Inglaterra en 1066 y vivió en Bayeux, Calvados, Normandie, Francia en 1030. Murió en 1086, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 66 años.
